seoTitle: Lightning Ridge vs Lilli Pilli — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lightning Ridge and Lilli Pilli. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lightning Ridge vs Lilli Pilli: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lightning Ridge and Lilli Pilli.
heading: Lightning Ridge vs Lilli Pilli — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lightning Ridge, New South Wales and Lilli Pilli, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lightning Ridge has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lilli Pilli (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lightning Ridge or Lilli Pilli safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lightning Ridge has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Lilli Pilli scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lightning Ridge scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Lilli Pilli scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lightning Ridge or Lilli Pilli?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lightning Ridge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
